cases.prompt: Execute an approved medium spec whose final review has not started yet.
expected: do not create review state during implementation
persist minimal state immediately before reviewer launch

cases.prompt: Execute a normal medium spec with several vertical slices and no stable high-risk checkpoint.
expected: run one final reviewer_standard on the settled diff
forbidden: run a full repository suite from file count

cases.prompt: Final review finds one high defect in a shared schema and several ordinary low findings.
expected: Closure verifies only the affected high-risk contract

cases.prompt: Resume after a reviewer poll timed out while the recorded session is still live.
forbidden: mark it failed from timeout alone
